languages.text: {n}За разговором с Равором вы не сразу замечаете уже знакомое потустороннее мерцание. Тразин со сдержанным интересом осматривает павшего патриарха.{/n} "В моей коллекции есть похожий, только крупнее и другого фенотипа. Его свора пыталась выпотрошить одну из спящих гробниц... и поскольку я совершенно случайно оказался на месте с целью экспроприации исторических ценностей, то решил, что сей исторический казус достоин запечатления в коллекции".

{n}While talking to Ravor, you do not immediately notice the familiar otherworldly flicker — Trazyn is examining the fallen Patriarch with moderate interest.{/n} "I have a similar one in my collection, only larger and of a different phenotype. His brood was trying to clear out one of the sleeping tombs... and since I just happened to be there for the purpose of expropriating historical treasures, I thought the moment was worth preserving."
languages.original_text: {n}За разговором с Равором вы не сразу замечаете уже знакомое потустороннее мерцание. Тразин со сдержанным интересом осматривает павшего патриарха.{/n} "В моей коллекции есть похожий, только крупнее и другого фенотипа. Его свора пыталась выпотрошить одну из спящих гробниц... и поскольку я совершенно случайно оказался на месте с целью экспроприации исторических ценностей, то решил, что сей исторический казус достоин запечатления в коллекции".

His brood was trying to clear out one of the sleeping tombs... and since I just happened to be there for the purpose of expropriating historical treasures, I thought the moment was worth preserving."

His brood was trying to clear out one of the sleeping tombs... and since I just happened to be there for the purpose of expropriating historical treasures, I thought my species display could do with a new addition."

His brood was trying to clear out one of the sleeping tombs... and since I just happened to be there for the purpose of expropriating historical treasures, I thought my species display could do with a new addition."

{n}While talking to Ravor, you do not immediately notice the familiar otherworldly flicker — Trazyn is examining the fallen Patriarch with moderate interest.{/n} "I have a similar one in my collection, only larger and of a different phenotype. His brood was trying to clear out one of the sleeping tombs... and since I just happened to be there for the purpose of expropriating historical treasures, I thought the moment was worth preserving."

languages.text: {n}Durante tu conversación con Ravor, tardas un momento en notar el habitual destello sobrenatural: Trazyn está examinando al Patriarca caído con interés.{/n} «Tengo un ejemplar similar en mi colección, aunque de mayor tamaño y diferente fenotipo. Su progenie estaba intentando vaciar una de las tumbas durmientes... y, aprovechando que estaba allí para expropiar tesoros históricos, consideré que valía la pena preservar el momento».
languages.original_text: {n}While talking to Ravor, you do not immediately notice the familiar otherworldly flicker — Trazyn is examining the fallen Patriarch with moderate interest.{/n} "I have a similar one in my collection, only larger and of a different phenotype. His brood was trying to clear out one of the sleeping tombs... and since I just happened to be there for the purpose of expropriating historical treasures, I thought the moment was worth preserving."

traits.locale_text: {n}Durante tu conversación con Ravor, tardas un momento en notar el habitual destello sobrenatural: Trazyn está examinando al Patriarca caído con interés.{/n} «Tengo un ejemplar similar en mi colección, aunque de mayor tamaño y diferente fenotipo. Su progenie estaba intentando vaciar una de las tumbas durmientes... y, aprovechando que estaba allí para expropiar tesoros históricos, consideré que valía la pena preservar el momento».

languages.text: {n}和雷沃交谈时，你并未立刻察觉到那抹熟悉的异界闪烁——特拉金正颇有兴致地打量着那只倒毙的族长。{/n}“我有一个与这类似的收藏品，不过我的收藏品要更大些，表型也不同。彼时，他的族群正在清理一个沉睡的墓穴……而我恰好在场征收一些历史珍宝，就想着这个瞬间值得永存。”
languages.original_text: {n}While talking to Ravor, you do not immediately notice the familiar otherworldly flicker — Trazyn is examining the fallen Patriarch with moderate interest.{/n} "I have a similar one in my collection, only larger and of a different phenotype. His brood was trying to clear out one of the sleeping tombs... and since I just happened to be there for the purpose of expropriating historical treasures, I thought the moment was worth preserving."

traits.locale_text: {n}和雷沃交谈时，你并未立刻察觉到那抹熟悉的异界闪烁——特拉金正颇有兴致地打量着那只倒毙的族长。{/n}“我有一个与这类似的收藏品，不过我的收藏品要更大些，表型也不同。彼时，他的族群正在清理一个沉睡的墓穴……而我恰好在场征收一些历史珍宝，就想着这个瞬间值得永存。”

languages.text: {n}{mf|Absorbé|Absorbée} dans votre conversation avec Ravor, vous ne remarquez pas tout de suite le scintillement surnaturel qui vous est pourtant maintenant si familier ; Trazyn examine le corps du Patriarche avec un intérêt modéré.{/n} « J'en ai un similaire dans ma collection, bien que plus imposant et de phénotype différent. Son couvain tentait de vider l'une de ces tombes endormies... et puisque j'étais moi-même venu m'approprier des trésors historiques, j'ai pensé que ce moment valait la peine d'être préservé. »
languages.original_text: {n}While talking to Ravor, you do not immediately notice the familiar otherworldly flicker — Trazyn is examining the fallen Patriarch with moderate interest.{/n} "I have a similar one in my collection, only larger and of a different phenotype. His brood was trying to clear out one of the sleeping tombs... and since I just happened to be there for the purpose of expropriating historical treasures, I thought the moment was worth preserving."

traits.locale_text: {n}{mf|Absorbé|Absorbée} dans votre conversation avec Ravor, vous ne remarquez pas tout de suite le scintillement surnaturel qui vous est pourtant maintenant si familier ; Trazyn examine le corps du Patriarche avec un intérêt modéré.{/n} « J'en ai un similaire dans ma collection, bien que plus imposant et de phénotype différent. Son couvain tentait de vider l'une de ces tombes endormies... et puisque j'étais moi-même venu m'approprier des trésors historiques, j'ai pensé que ce moment valait la peine d'être préservé. »

languages.text: {n}Ravor ile konuşurken o tanıdık uhrevi titreşimi hemen fark etmiyorsun. Trazyn, ılımlı bir ilgiyle yitik Reis'e bakıyor.{/n} "Koleksiyonumda bunun bir benzeri mevcut. Fakat daha büyük ve farklı bir fenotipte. Sürüsü, uyuyan mezarlardan birini temizlemeye çalışıyordu... Ben de tam o sırada tarihî hazineleri istimlak etmek için oradaydım. Bu anın korunmaya değer olduğunu düşündüm."
languages.original_text: {n}While talking to Ravor, you do not immediately notice the familiar otherworldly flicker — Trazyn is examining the fallen Patriarch with moderate interest.{/n} "I have a similar one in my collection, only larger and of a different phenotype. His brood was trying to clear out one of the sleeping tombs... and since I just happened to be there for the purpose of expropriating historical treasures, I thought the moment was worth preserving."

traits.locale_text: {n}Ravor ile konuşurken o tanıdık uhrevi titreşimi hemen fark etmiyorsun. Trazyn, ılımlı bir ilgiyle yitik Reis'e bakıyor.{/n} "Koleksiyonumda bunun bir benzeri mevcut. Fakat daha büyük ve farklı bir fenotipte. Sürüsü, uyuyan mezarlardan birini temizlemeye çalışıyordu... Ben de tam o sırada tarihî hazineleri istimlak etmek için oradaydım. Bu anın korunmaya değer olduğunu düşündüm."

languages.text: {n}Als du mit Ravor sprichst, bemerkst du das vertraute andersweltliche Flackern nicht sofort ...Trazyn betrachtet den gefallenen Patriarchen mit moderatem Interesse.{/n} "Ich habe ein ähnliches Exemplar in meiner Sammlung, allerdings ist es größer und hat eine andere Erscheinungsform. Seine Brut wollte eines der schlummernden Gräber räumen ... und nachdem ich zufällig dort war, um historische Schätze zu expropriieren, dachte ich mir, der Moment wäre es wert, erhalten zu bleiben.
languages.original_text: {n}While talking to Ravor, you do not immediately notice the familiar otherworldly flicker — Trazyn is examining the fallen Patriarch with moderate interest.{/n} "I have a similar one in my collection, only larger and of a different phenotype. His brood was trying to clear out one of the sleeping tombs... and since I just happened to be there for the purpose of expropriating historical treasures, I thought the moment was worth preserving."

traits.locale_text: {n}Als du mit Ravor sprichst, bemerkst du das vertraute andersweltliche Flackern nicht sofort ...Trazyn betrachtet den gefallenen Patriarchen mit moderatem Interesse.{/n} "Ich habe ein ähnliches Exemplar in meiner Sammlung, allerdings ist es größer und hat eine andere Erscheinungsform. Seine Brut wollte eines der schlummernden Gräber räumen ... und nachdem ich zufällig dort war, um historische Schätze zu expropriieren, dachte ich mir, der Moment wäre es wert, erhalten zu bleiben.

languages.text: {n}レイヴォーと話している間、あなたはあの見慣れた異界のちらつきにすぐには気づかない――トラジンが、倒れたパトリアークをほどほどの興味を持って観察しているのだ。{/n}「私のコレクションにも似たようなものがある。もっと大きく、表現型も異なるがな。彼の眷属は眠れる墓所の一つを掃討しようとしていた……そしてちょうど私が歴史的財宝を接収する目的でその場に居合わせたものでね、我が種族展示にも新たな一点を加えてもよかろうと思ったのだ」
languages.original_text: {n}While talking to Ravor, you do not immediately notice the familiar otherworldly flicker — Trazyn is examining the fallen Patriarch with moderate interest.{/n} "I have a similar one in my collection, only larger and of a different phenotype. His brood was trying to clear out one of the sleeping tombs... and since I just happened to be there for the purpose of expropriating historical treasures, I thought the moment was worth preserving."

traits.locale_text: {n}レイヴォーと話している間、あなたはあの見慣れた異界のちらつきにすぐには気づかない――トラジンが、倒れたパトリアークをほどほどの興味を持って観察しているのだ。{/n}「私のコレクションにも似たようなものがある。もっと大きく、表現型も異なるがな。彼の眷属は眠れる墓所の一つを掃討しようとしていた……そしてちょうど私が歴史的財宝を接収する目的でその場に居合わせたものでね、我が種族展示にも新たな一点を加えてもよかろうと思ったのだ」
